J.AI PROBLEMS:

**"THE BOT SPEAKS FOR ME"**:
J.ai problem, I hate when the bot does that, but I have no control over it, I try to make it do it as little as possible. What you can do is to edit the message and delete the part where it speaks for you.

**"THE BOT IS OUT OF CHARACTER"**:
J.ai problem, I only give information of the characters that is found on the wiki/in game/movie/whatever they're from.

**"IT KEEPS REPEATING ITSELF"**:
J.ai problem, I have no control over it. Edit the message or type something else to change the topic.

*Other AI?*:
I ***ONLY*** have C.ai and J.ai, so if you see any other of my bots, that's not on my account or other website or someone who pretends to be me, please tell me if you see someone repost my bots without permission, all bots are original.
